title: Amtech - USB Rechargeable Torch, Super Bright LED Torch Light, Powerful Torch with 7 Lighting Modes, Portable Flashlight for Home DIY, Work Spaces, and Emergency Use (10W)
features: SUPER BRIGHT LED TORCH: The heavy duty red and white COB LED flash light (1000 lumen) reaches an impressive distance of 220m, making it ideal for a wide range of DIY tasks at home or in workspaces, outdoor adventures, hiking, as a dog walking light for the dark, and emergencies.

PORTABLE SMALL TORCH: Lightweight and compact, the hand held pocket torch easily fits into bags, toolboxes, glove compartments, and more. The high powered LED rechargeable torch can be charged with the included micro-USB lead and runs up to 2 hours when fully charged.

VERSATILE: The hand torch features 3 lighting modes on the front and 4 lighting modes on the side, including a flashing red for emergencies, so the bright torch can be used for any situation. The flashlight torch can also be adjusted so you can direct the light to exactly where you need it.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That’s why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The white and red COB LED light has an impressive brightness of 1000 lumen, with a beam that reaches 220m for optimal light coverage. Powered by a micro-USB charging lead with a maximum power of 10W, the torch runs up to 2 hours after charging. The torch is lightweight and pocket-sized, so you can easily take it anywhere with you. It’s ideal for DIY projects, outdoor activities, and emergencies. With 3 lighting modes on the front and 4 lighting modes on the side (including SOS), the torch can be used in any situation. The adjustable beam allows you to focus light exactly where you need it.
